titleStmt.title: SII 25.123: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 123. (A.R. No. 123 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record begins with the praśasti Pūvinkiḻatti-mēvi-vīṟṟiruppa, etc., of the king.

It records the sale-deed executed in the name of deity Chaṇḍēśvara by Tiruchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Poṟpadikkunāyagaṉ for the sale of kārāḻmai (cultivators right) of the lands and the income from kaḍamai, antarāyam etc., at Teṉvāyiḍaikkuḍi assigned to the deities Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nā[ya*]ṉār and Viṉāyagappiḷḷai enjoyed from the days of his father to a certain Dēvarkaṇḍiyadēvar after receiving the sale value (viḷaipporuḷ), who assigned the same for the purpose of food-offerings to the deity Tirukkāmakōṭṭamuḍaiya-nāchchiyār set up by him in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār at Tiruppattūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. The inscription ends with the phrase Śrīmāhēśvara-rakshai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūviṉ kiḻatti meviṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟpuṇara vayappor maṭantai jayappuyattiruppa mākkalai maṭantaivākki
ṉil viḷaṅkatticaiyiru nāṉkum vicainilāveṟippa maṟaiṉeṟivaḷar maṉuṉeṟi tikaḻa Aṟaṉeṟic camayaṅkaḷ ḷāṟuntaḻaippakkāṉa ve
ṅ kaiyai villuṭaṉ turantu miṉavaṉ kaṉakāsaṉattu viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻkaṭal Eḻpoḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ ceṅkol naṭappa ko
ṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilattoḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭar varāṭar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟai paṇiya Irunemiyaḷavu morunemi yoṅka I
ṉṉamurtākiya Iyalicai nāṭaka maṉṉivaḷaramaṉimuṭi cūṭi veṟpaṉa voṅki virasiṁhāsaṉattu kaṟpakaniḻaṟkiḻ kalai valor pukaḻ maṉṉa
var teviyar vaṇaṅki niṉṟetta Aṉṉameṉṉaṭai Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa
ccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaśekhara devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vati ṉetir 10 1vatu keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr tiruttaḷi yāṇṭa nāyaṉār śrīkoyi
lil tevar kaṇṭiya tevar Eḻuntaruḷivitta tirukkāmak koṭṭamuṭaiya nācciyāṟku caṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ poṟpatikku nāyaka
ṉeṉ muṉpu Eṉ pitā tamakku kārāḻmaiyākavum tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉāṟkum viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟkum kaṭamai Antarāyamiṟuppatākavum koṇṭu Aṉubhavit
tu varukiṟa teṉvāyiṭaikkuṭivaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟu muṟṟukku tevar kaṇṭiya tevar pakkal vilaip poruḷkoṇṭu Eṉ kārāḻmai tirukkāmakoṭṭaḻuṭaiya nācci
yāṟku tiruvamutum Uḷḷiṭṭa vyanjaṉattukku candrādityavaṟ celvatāka caṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟu kuṭutteṉ Itu śrī māheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 25.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
